title: Fashion Inspiration: Cherry Blossoms

content:
I’m spending the weekend in Washington D.C. to check out (what’s left of) the cherry blossoms! It’s something I’ve always wanted to see, since I love when the bloom around Philly. Of course, several bad storms have knocked most of the petals off the trees, but I can’t wait to walk around anyway! It’s pretty obvious why I picked cherry blossoms for my fashion inspiration today!

You probably wouldn’t want to wear this entire outfit at once, since there would be so much going on! However, any one of these pieces would show your love for the Spring and cherry trees just perfectly. Shop the entire look below!

Dress: ModCloth

TOMS Shoes: Kellisim

Scarf: xTheScarfShop

Ring: Pandora

Earrings: Katie Crafts

Cuccio Nail Polish, in color Kyoto Cherry Blossoms: Amazon

Which cherry blossom themed item did you like the best? If you’ve ever been to D.C., what was your favorite thing to do or see there?
